description: Log in to ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus as 'administrator' (password: 'administrator') and link the two open service requests regarding VPN connectivity issues in Building A: 'VPN connection drops intermittently...' and 'Unable to establish VPN tunnel...'. Set the relationship type between these requests to 'Related'.

metadata.request_a_subject: VPN connection drops intermittently for Building A users
metadata.request_b_subject: Unable to establish VPN tunnel from Building A conference rooms
